name: Foolproof Dark Chocolate Fudge (Borden)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt chocolate chips with condensed milk and salt over low heat.
2. Remove from heat; stir in nuts and vanilla.
3. Spread mixture evenly into wax paper-lined 8 or 9-inch square pan.
4. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
5. Turn fudge onto a cutting board; peel off paper and cut into squares.
6. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
MICROWAVE:
1. In a quart glass measure, combine chocolate chips with condensed milk and salt.
2. Cook on high for 3 minutes, stirring after each 1 1/2 minutes until melted.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients as above.
4. Proceed with steps 3-6 from the original recipe. (This microwave method works well in a 750-watt oven; it may need longer cooking times in others - GLH)
